subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been illumined by the lamp that hath lit up earth and heaven! If thou wouldst but behold the lights of grace that have shone upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استضاء من مصباح اضاء به الارض و السموات لو اطلعت بانوار فضل سطعت علیک
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @predictions and prophecies, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @angels
